workers.name: Backend
workers.task: JWT 인증 API를 구현하세요. FastAPI 기반으로 /auth/login, /auth/register, /auth/refresh 엔드포인트를 만들고, access/refresh 토큰 발급 로직을 작성하세요. tests/ 디렉토리에 단위 테스트도 포함하세요.
success_criteria: Auth endpoints implement the documented request/response contract
workers.stop_condition: Stop when focused backend auth tests pass, or when a missing dependency blocks verification.
approval_boundary: Do not change production secrets or deploy without explicit approval.

workers.name: Frontend
workers.task: 로그인/회원가입 UI를 구현하세요. React 컴포넌트로 LoginPage, RegisterPage를 만들고, JWT 토큰을 localStorage에 저장하는 auth hook을 작성하세요. 폼 유효성 검사를 포함하세요.
success_criteria: Signup and login UI cover success, loading, and error states
Frontend uses the backend auth contract recorded by Backend
workers.stop_condition: Stop when the auth UI is locally verifiable, or when the backend contract is insufficient.
approval_boundary: Do not redesign unrelated screens without explicit approval.

workers.name: Tests
workers.task: E2E 테스트를 작성하세요. Playwright를 사용해서 회원가입 → 로그인 → 토큰 갱신 → 로그아웃 시나리오를 테스트하세요. CI에서 실행 가능한 설정 파일도 포함하세요.
success_criteria: Signup, login, refresh, and logout E2E scenario passes
Any environment blocker is documented with reproduction details
workers.stop_condition: Stop when the E2E scenario passes, or when local app/test environment access is blocked.
approval_boundary: Do not weaken assertions or skip failing coverage without explicit approval.
